title: Elemental Dragon
description: The powers of the elemental dragon
body:
Elemental Dragon is a Minecraft plugin that brings powerful elemental abilities to your Paper/ Folia server. Starting with a mysterious Dragon Egg, players can unleash devastating lightning strikes on their foes.

  As players progress, they discover four Elemental Fragments, each granting unique powers:

  - Burning Fragment - Wield fire abilities, gain 100% fire immunity, and summon the Infernal Domain
  - Agility Fragment - Move with 30% increased speed and execute aerial combat maneuvers
  - Immortal Fragment - Cheat death through the Phoenix Rebirth ability
  - Corrupted Core - Freeze enemies with Dread Gaze and drain life force

  The plugin features a sophisticated HUD system that displays:
  - Passive fragment bonuses
  - Active ability cooldowns with real-time countdowns
  - Debuff timers showing frozen/duration effects
  - Visual progress bars for all abilities

  Also includes the Chronicle of the Fallen Dragons - an immersive lore book system documenting the ancient dragons and their fragments.

  Perfect for survival servers looking to add engaging progression and unique PvP/PvE abilities. Requires Paper 1.21.x or Folia.
